      Acetaminophen & 10.554 & 1.427 & 0.5026 & 0.0785 \\
      Ibuprofen & 10.506 & 1.428 & 0.2867 & 0.0819 \\
      \midrule
      \multicolumn{5}{l}{\textit{Train: 28,644 obs\quad Test: 4,287 obs\quad Stores: 93\quad Weeks: 1--399}} \\
      \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
    \begin{tablenotes}\small
      \item Unit prices standardised to per-100-tablet equivalent.
    \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Consumer Surplus Loss from 10\% Ibuprofen Price Increase --- Dominick\'s Analgesics (1 run(s); mean $\pm$ std)}
  \label{tab:dom_welfare}
  \begin{threeparttable}
    \begin{tabular}{lcr}
      \toprule
      \textbf{Model} & \textbf{CV Loss (\$)} & \textbf{vs Neural Demand (static)} \\
      \midrule
      LA-AIDS & $-0.2322$ & +0.8\% \\
      BLP (IV) & $-0.2212$ & +5.5\% \\
      QUAIDS & $-0.2339$ & +0.0\% \\
      Series Est. & $-0.2333$ & +0.3\% \\
      Neural Demand (window) & $-0.2364$ & -1.0\% \\
      LDS (Shared) & $-0.2821$ & -20.6\% \\
      LDS (GoodSpec) & $-0.2818$ & -20.4\% \\
      LDS (Orth) & $-0.2498$ & -6.7\% \\
      Neural Demand (static) & $-0.2340$ &  \\
      Neural Demand (habit) & $-0.2146$ & +8.3\% \\
      Var. Mixture & $-0.3757$ & -60.5\% \\
      Neural Demand (FE) & $-0.2305$ & +1.5\% \\
      Neural Demand (habit, FE) & $-0.2093$ & +10.6\% \\
      Neural Demand (CF) & $-0.2265$ & +3.2\% \\
      Neural Demand (habit, CF) & $-0.2110$ & +9.9\% \\
      Neural Demand (habit, FE, CF) & $-0.2153$ & +8.0\% \\
      \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
    \begin{tablenotes}\small
      \item Compensating variation via 100-step Riemann sum, $p_{\mathrm{Ibu}}\to(1+0.1)\,p_{\mathrm{Ibu}}$.
    \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{MDP State Augmentation: Brand Loyalty in Analgesic Demand (1 run(s); mean $\pm$ std)}
  \label{tab:dom_mdp}
  \begin{threeparttable}
    \begin{tabular}{lcccc}
      \toprule
      \textbf{Model} & \textbf{RMSE} & \textbf{KL Div.} & \textbf{Reduction} \\
      \midrule
      LA-AIDS & $0.07069$ & $0.02311$ & baseline \\
      Neural Demand (static) & $0.08028$ & $0.02943$ & -13.6% \\
      Neural Demand (habit) & $0.05147$ & $0.01238$ & 27.2% \\
      Neural Demand (CF) & $0.07026$ & $0.02261$ & 0.6% \\
      Neural Demand (habit, CF) & $0.05103$ & $0.01201$ & 27.8% \\
      \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
    \begin{tablenotes}\small
      \item Habit-decay $\hat{\delta}$ (habit model) = 0.512$\pm$0.000; FE variant: 0.512$\pm$0.000.
      RMSE and KL: mean $\pm$ std over 1 independent re-estimation(s).
    \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Variational Mixture IRL: Consumer Segments --- Dominick\'s Analgesics ($K=4$; last of 1 run(s))}
  \label{tab:dom_mix}
  \begin{threeparttable}
    \begin{tabular}{cS[table-format=1.3]S[table-format=1.3]S[table-format=1.3]S[table-format=1.3]S[table-format=1.3]l}
      \toprule
      $k$ & {$\hat{\pi}_k$} & {$\hat{\alpha}_{\text{Asp}}$} & {$\hat{\alpha}_{\text{Acet}}$} & {$\hat{\alpha}_{\text{Ibu}}$} & {$\hat{\rho}$} & Segment \\
      \midrule
      1 & 0.060 & 0.348 & 0.290 & 0.362 & 0.300 & Balanced \\
      2 & 0.077 & 0.354 & 0.242 & 0.405 & 0.400 & Balanced \\
      3 & 0.844 & 0.358 & 0.388 & 0.254 & 0.505 & \textbf{Dominant / mixed} \\
      4 & 0.018 & 0.307 & 0.294 & 0.399 & 0.600 & Price-sensitive switchers \\
      \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
    \begin{tablenotes}\small
      \item Gaussian mixture in $(\bm{\alpha},\rho)$ CES parameter space.
    \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}
